title: PvP Essentials 1.21+
description: Every Essential YOU Need For PvP! Includes No Bobber, No Fire, Low Shield, Small Totem Pop, & More!
body:
Hello there! This texture pack is perfect for pvpers, it includes everything that you might need. And soon enough you won't ever consider playing without PvP Essentials again!

This pack is intended to be an overlay but can be used by itself so this means you can put it on top of other packs that you like and no textures (the bow and crossbow textures will change aswell as the ores.) will be changed! This is the OFFICIAL PvP Essentials and this pack isn't on any other website.

# Features
- No Bobber
- No Eating Particles
- Smaller Utils
- No Fire
- Smaller Totem
- Smaller Totem Pop
- Smaller Totem Particles
- No Explosion Particles
- No Pumpkin Blur 
- No Vignette
- Better Water Visibility
- Low Shield
- No Fire Smoke
- Quieter Explosion Sounds
- Quieter Fire Tick Sounds
- No Nausea Overlay
- Quieter Weather Sounds
- Colored Crossbow Charging Animation
- Colored Bow Charging Animation
- Bordered Ores

<details>
<summary>Issues</summary>

Please report any bugs/issues you find to my discord elua633.

</details>
